To: Board of Directors, KestrelWave Holdings Ltd. (SGX-ST Mainboard)
From: Ms. Serene Toh, General Counsel; contact: compliance@kestrelwave.sg
Subject: Confidential update on proposed acquisition of Auric DPT Services Pte. Ltd., cyber remediation, ESG metrics, and disclosure controls under SFA/SGX rules
We have executed a non-binding term sheet to acquire 70% of Auric DPT Services Pte. Ltd. for S$84–S$96 million, subject to MAS fit-and-proper and SGX classification; this is not generally available information.
Draft SPA provides an earn-out linked to DPT wallet AUM and tokenised-carbon marketplace volumes, and our diligence indicates an emissions disclosure restatement may be required by the target (not yet public).
A ransomware incident at our cloud vendor ZephyraGrid (undisclosed externally) affected 2,104 DPT wallet logs and certain vendor credentials; no NRICs are stored, but PDPA risk arises from IP addresses and device IDs.
Until an SGX announcement under Listing Manual Rule 703 is approved, implement a trading blackout for all designated persons and update the insider list maintained by Company Secretary Mr. Iqram Salleh.
Information barriers apply: the Auric diligence room is wall-crossed; only those on the insider list may access the cyber and ESG notes, and tipping is prohibited under the SFA.
For PDPA compliance, share only de-identified samples and encrypt any DPT log extracts; Auric’s counsel BrightRidge Law LLP may review via clean team only, with no access by their business unit.
If the Scope 2 recalculation reduces the margin on our sustainability-linked loan, finance may renegotiate the step-downs; do not selectively disclose any ratchet terms in investor interactions before a formal SGX release.
Please note the ESG community webinar next week is purely educational and will describe climate transition risks and what an “insider list” is without referencing any live transactions or pricing.
Marketing has a blog on cyber hygiene and crypto custody best practices for retail users that contains no breach specifics and should be checked solely for PDPA compliance language.
Operations reminder: the “Crypto Insider” training module uses simulated trade scenarios and dummy deal codenames, and no one should infer market sensitivity from that content.
Legal will prepare a draft announcement and seek pre-clearance, and we will file an MAS pre-notification regarding the change in control of a DPT-related business.
Any media queries must be routed to IR; no off-the-record confirmations or selective disclosure of commercial terms are permitted.
Target timeline remains indicative and contingent on conditions precedent, with public release of any material terms only after board approval and counsel sign-off.
Direct queries to Ms. Serene Toh or to Mr. Devraj Tham, CFO, at devraj.tham@kestrelwave.sg; do not forward this memo outside the information barrier.
